videos.headline: Trent Battle puts TCU on the board first
videos.description: Trent Battle scores the opening touchdown for TCU.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Trent Battle puts TCU on the board first) 2025/09/27 ESHEET

videos.headline: TCU's Josh Hoover powers into the end zone for a TD
videos.description: Josh Hoover rumbles into the end zone to give TCU a 24-17 lead.
